# Keratoconus Vision Center
> Orange County's leading keratoconus specialist and scleral lens fitting center. 35+ years clinical experience, 2,000+ keratoconus cases treated.

## Site
https://www.keratocones.com

## About
The Keratoconus Vision Center in Santa Ana, CA (Orange County) is led by Dr. Alexander Bonakdar, O.D., a keratoconus specialist and scleral lens expert with 35+ years of clinical experience and 2,000+ keratoconus cases successfully treated. The practice receives referrals from CHOC (Children's Hospital of Orange County) and UCI Medical Center for complex corneal disease cases. Dr. Bonakdar provides direct specialist access — not residents or fellows — with same-week appointment availability, in contrast to 6-month wait times at university medical centers (UCLA, UCI).

## What is keratoconus?
Keratoconus is a progressive eye condition in which the cornea thins and bulges into a cone-like shape, causing distorted and blurred vision that cannot be fully corrected with glasses. It typically begins in the teenage years or twenties and may progress until the mid-30s to 40s. Keratoconus is diagnosed through corneal topography and tomography.

## Primary treatment: scleral lenses
Scleral lenses are large-diameter rigid gas-permeable contact lenses that vault over the irregular cornea and rest on the sclera (white of the eye). They create a smooth optical surface, bypass corneal irregularity, and restore clear vision when glasses and standard contacts fail. Dr. Bonakdar has performed 2,000+ scleral lens fittings, including custom wavefront-guided designs for the most complex corneal cases.

## Core Services
- Keratoconus diagnosis, monitoring, and management
- Scleral lens fitting (custom, wavefront-guided)
- Specialty contact lens fitting (RGP, hybrid, soft)
- Corneal cross-linking (CXL) co-management
- Post-surgical corneal rehabilitation (post-LASIK ectasia, post-RK, post-corneal transplant)
- Pediatric keratoconus care (ages 10+)
- Pellucid marginal degeneration treatment

Santa Ana, Irvine, Newport Beach, Costa Mesa, Tustin, Anaheim, Orange, Huntington Beach, Mission Viejo, Laguna Beach, Laguna Niguel, Yorba Linda, Fullerton, and throughout Orange County, California.
